top_level_fields.contract_field_description: Canonical customer-presentable title for the generated Candidate Presentation draft.
top_level_fields.contract_field_content_boundary: Use exactly this format: Presentation för Matchnings-ID: <matchId>.
Must not contain operations-only notes, internal evidence mechanics, debug text, or runtime/model language.

top_level_fields.contract_field_description: Operations-only review content for human editing, approval, and evidence inspection.
top_level_fields.contract_field_content_boundary: May contain uncertainty and evidence limitations; must not be sent as customer-facing prose.

top_level_fields.contract_field_description: Structured trace linking important generated claims to supplied evidence.
top_level_fields.contract_field_content_boundary: Compact evidence mapping only; not narrative content.

presentationTitle.description: Canonical customer-presentable title for the generated Candidate Presentation draft.

Candidate Presentation Overview.description: Concise overview of the presented candidate and matched mission context.

Mission Overview.description: Slot-neutral overview of the mission and customer need.

Mission Slot Match Details.description: One-slot summary for the exact mission slot this candidate is matched to.

Matched Role.description: Matched role for the single mission slot this artifact covers.

Matched Primary Skills.description: Primary skills that directly match the mission slot.

Matched Secondary Skills.description: Secondary skills that support the match.

About the Matching Candidate.description: Candidate name, matched role, and relevant professional profile.

Role fit.description: Why the candidate fits the matched mission role.

Work mode fit.description: How candidate work mode availability aligns with the mission.

Experience and availability.description: Experience level and availability facts relevant to the mission.

Certifications.description: Certifications or certification-like credentials present in evidence.

opsReviewContent.description: Operations-only review content for human editing, approval, and evidence inspection.

Relevant Work Experience.description: Internal work-experience evidence that helps operations review the presentation.

Operations Review Notes.description: Internal notes, uncertainty, gaps, and approval/edit concerns.

evidenceTrace.description: Structured trace linking important generated claims to supplied evidence.

Presentation Section.description: The generated section whose claim is being supported.

Evidence Family.description: The evidence category used for the claim.

Evidence Used.description: The compact evidence detail used for the generated claim.
